title: helianthemum origanifolium var. molle
intro: Helianthemum origanifolium var. molle is a plant species in the rockrose family, characterized by its fragrant, pink or white flowers and soft, woolly leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum origanifolium var. molle include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
